title: armeriastrum lycopodioides
intro: Armeriastrum lycopodioides, also known as False Marestail, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Armeriastrum lycopodioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a potential remedy for various ailments such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes. Armeriastrum lycopodioides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
